name: Chicken Wings with Pineapple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together all marinade ingredients and cut-up chicken wings.
2. Marinade for at least 1 hour.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F.
4. Place chicken wings and marinade on a 15 x 10 x 1 jelly roll pan.
5. Bake, stirring occasionally, for 50 to 60 minutes or until browned and fork tender.
6. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine all sauce ingredients.
7. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened and heated through (3 to 5 minutes).
